name: LLM-Backed Conversation (Model-Agnostic)

owner_decisions.model_agnostic_mandate: Kiaros never hardcoded to a provider/model; Anthropic first implementation only

implemented: LLMProvider abstraction (types.ts): the only contract Kiaros knows
AnthropicProvider (@anthropic-ai/sdk, default claude-opus-4-8, no sampling params, refusal-safe)
async ConversationManager: intent/mode/context retained; LLM-first; template fallback (never mute)
Kiaros persona system prompt with hard no-execution honesty constraints + TTS brevity
history (last 20 turns) threaded to provider; responseSource/provider/model metadata
config llm section + .env.example docs + jarvis/.env (local Ollama granite4.1:3b, fully on-machine)
fix: latent dotenv/ESM-hoisting bug (env values never reached config since B11)
desktop chat timeout 10s->60s; E2E reply check waits past Processing indicator; screenshot path parameterized

live_llm_reply.sample: Good morning! I'm Kiaros, Teddie's assistant AI... (no direct execution)...

verification.anthropic_wire_test: PASS (invalid key -> 401 authentication_error from api.anthropic.com with request_id; clean fallback). Live replies pending owner API key
verification.browser_e2e: 7/7 PASS, console clean, genuine LLM reply via UI; AUDIT/PHASE5_desktop_e2e.png

open_items: live Anthropic verification awaits owner API key (set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in jarvis/.env)
local 3B model quality ceiling; experience scales with configured model
template-era history mildly pollutes LLM context (owner call to clear)
streaming responses and Anthropic prompt caching: future enhancements
MC read-only context + Approval Engine: deferred by owner decision
